howItWorks.intro: This us dollar collapse calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Import Price Impact = Current Price / (1 - Devaluation %)
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: What would happen if the US dollar collapsed?
faq.answer: A dollar collapse would mean rapid purchasing power loss. Savings would buy less, imported goods would skyrocket in price, but debts would effectively shrink in real terms. Essential goods like food, fuel, and medicine would see the biggest price spikes.

faq.question: How can I protect against dollar devaluation?
faq.answer: Common hedges include gold/silver, real estate, foreign currency holdings, commodities, Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities (TIPS), and Bitcoin. Diversification across asset classes is the most prudent approach.

faq.question: Has the US dollar ever collapsed?
faq.answer: The USD has never fully collapsed, but has experienced significant devaluations: the 1971 Nixon Shock (gold standard end), the 1985 Plaza Accord (40% decline vs major currencies), and periodic weakness during financial crises.

faq.question: Is the US Dollar Collapse Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the US Dollar Collapse Calculator?
sections.body: The US Dollar Collapse Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your total savings, annual income, mortgage balance, you get instant results including savings real value, purchasing power lost, weekly groceries. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.
